highlights.text: Chauffeur-driven luxury sedan with CP breakfast plan
Complimentary private Lake Pichola boat cruise
Welcome honeymoon amenities — cake and floral decor

itinerary.title: Premium Rajasthan Palace Honeymoon
itinerary.tagline: Udaipur • Jodhpur — 05 Nights / 06 Days of Royal Romance
itinerary.overview: The Best Rajasthan Tour Package beckons lovers into an immersive realm of heritage hospitality, timeless romance, and majestic architectural marvels. This meticulously planned Rajasthan Honeymoon Package weaves together the ethereal lakes of Udaipur and the sun-kissed blue fortresses of Jodhpur. Private FIT tour with dedicated chauffeur-driven executive vehicle. Route: Udaipur Arrival → Udaipur Sightseeing → Ranakpur Enroute → Jodhpur Sightseeing → Jodhpur Departure. Best season: October to March.
itinerary.seo_title: RJ-005 | Premium Rajasthan Palace Honeymoon | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Luxury 05 Nights / 06 Days Rajasthan honeymoon (RJ-005): Udaipur and Jodhpur with Lake Pichola cruise, City Palace, Mehrangarh Fort, and Ranakpur Jain Temple.

days.title: Arrival in Udaipur | Romantic Arrival & Sunset Boat Cruise
days.description: Traditional royal welcome and private boat cruise on Lake Pichola at golden hour with views of Jag Mandir and City Palace.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Lake Pichola Cruise, Jag Mandir Views, Local Romantic Promenades
Optional Activities: Couples' traditional attire photoshoot
Evening Experience: Lakeside candlelit fine-dining recommendation
Overnight Stay: Udaipur (Handpicked Palace/Resort)

days.title: Udaipur Exploration | Royal Grandeur & Couturier Markets
days.description: Tour City Palace, Jagdish Temple, Saheliyon-ki-Bari, and Vintage Car Museum. Evening miniature painting session and Hathipole Bazaar shopping.
activities: Sightseeing Included: City Palace, Jagdish Temple, Saheliyon-ki-Bari, Vintage Car Museum
Optional Activities: Cable car ride to Mansapurna Karni Mata Temple
Evening Experience: Live folk dance at Bagore Ki Haveli
Overnight Stay: Udaipur Palace Resort

days.title: Udaipur Excursion | Monsoon Palace & Lakeside Serenity
days.description: Visit Sajjangarh Monsoon Palace for panoramic vistas. Peaceful afternoon at Fateh Sagar Lake and Nehru Park.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Sajjangarh Monsoon Palace, Fateh Sagar Circuit, Nehru Park
Optional Activities: Speedboating on Fateh Sagar Lake
Evening Experience: Private sunset viewing from a mountain vantage point
Overnight Stay: Udaipur Palace Resort

days.title: Udaipur to Jodhpur via Ranakpur | Sacred Architecture
days.description: En-route visit to Ranakpur Jain Temple with 1,444 uniquely carved marble pillars. Arrive in Jodhpur and check into heritage palace hotel.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Ranakpur Jain Temple, Scenic Aravali Highway Drive
Optional Activities: Authentic Rajasthani Thali lunch en route
Evening Experience: Leisure time at your luxury heritage property
Overnight Stay: Jodhpur Luxury Palace

days.title: Jodhpur Sightseeing | Mehrangarh Fort & Royal Cenotaphs
days.description: Explore Mehrangarh Fort, Jaswant Thada, Clock Tower, and Sadar Market. Optional zip-lining over fort moats.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Mehrangarh Fort, Jaswant Thada, Clock Tower, Umaid Bhawan Museum
Optional Activities: Zip-lining over the Mehrangarh Fort moats
Evening Experience: Romantic rooftop dinner overlooking the illuminated fort
Overnight Stay: Jodhpur Luxury Palace

days.title: Jodhpur Departure | Royal Farewell
days.description: Final breakfast, optional souvenir shopping for local sweets and block-printed textiles, and transfer to Jodhpur Airport.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Local markets, souvenir stops
Meals Included: Premium Buffet Breakfast

hotels.name: The Leela Palace / Taj Lake Palace

inclusions.text: Daily premium multi-cuisine buffet breakfasts (CP plan)
All interstate taxes, tolls, parking, and driver allowances
Complimentary private boat cruise on Lake Pichola
Welcome honeymoon amenities (cake, floral decor arrangement)
Monument entry tickets, camera fees, and local guide fees
Optional activities (zip-lining, cable car, special dinners)
Mandatory festival or peak season gala dinner surcharges
